properties.bridge:name: Moy Viaduct
properties.name: Highland Main Line
properties.note: Constructed in 1887. Is the last remaining timber Viaduct on Scottish mainline. Refurbished 2003

properties.description: Not normally used in public service
properties.name: Rose Street Curve
Far North Line
properties.note: Regarding start date: Line from Inverness connected in 1864 as part of the Inverness and Ross-shire Railway. Line to Golspie was opened in 1868 as part of the Sutherland Railway. Both lines met at Ardgay.
